panel.apply-note: AQ_DRM_DEVICES is read at session start.

settings.title: NVIDIA Optimus
settings.description: The bar toggle flips Hyprland's AQ_DRM_DEVICES between Battery (iGPU only — the NVIDIA dGPU runtime-suspends, no HDMI) and HDMI-Ready (iGPU + dGPU — external outputs work). It edits ~/.config/hypr/env.conf (backed up alongside) and applies on the next login. The bar icon is theme-tinted: accent when the dGPU is awake, neutral when asleep. Stats poll every 2s from a bundled sysfs-only script that never wakes the GPU; nvidia-smi runs only while this panel is open, and only when the GPU is already awake.
settings.requirements: Requires: Hyprland (aquamarine), an NVIDIA Optimus laptop with the proprietary driver + nvidia-drm.modeset=1. Override the env file with $HYPR_ENV_FILE if yours lives elsewhere.
